stemHtml: How should one avoid a thunderstorm?

options.a: Fly on the upwind side of the storm, avoiding red and magenta coloured areas on the screen.
options.b: Fly 5 NM to the side of the thunderstorm.
options.c: Fly through, avoiding magenta on your AWR.
options.d: Fly through, turning on the anti-icing equipment available.
